channel.title: Ergfit on Al's Ramblings
channel.description: Recent content in Ergfit on Al's Ramblings

item.title: Bootcamp on Holiday
item.description: So I while I’m on holiday I know my fellow boot campers are sweating it out on the rowing machines, or the bicycle, or ski erg or whatever has been dreamed up.

item.title: Boot camp Session 2 & 3
item.description: Session 2 of boot camp saw some more testing, this time on the rowing machine. The stats read

item.title: Boot camp Day 1
item.description: Ergfit boot camp started today. It’s not the first boot camp I have done so I kinda know what I’ve signed up for , I think, different crew so it will know doubt have different challenges.

item.title: Ergfit Race 2
item.description: Last weekend saw the running of Race 2 of the Ergfit indoor Regatta. Yours truly tiped in with a PB time of 1:33.7 in the 500m event, .9 second quicker than race one. Aiming for a 1:32 so some work still to be done.
